title: Jujutsu Kaisen: Cursed Fate
description: This is a Jujutsu Kaisen inspired mod.
body:
![CursedFateLogo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/362236ce5611eb675cbf543605be38b3e7a944cb.png)

Cursed Fate introduces the world of Jujutsu (based on the popular Anime Jujutsu Kaisen) to the game. Explore unique structures, master your technique, learn Domain Expansion, fight NPCs and PVP with an in-depth combat system. This mod's sole focus is to provide players with the experience of an RPG power fantasy that blends well into the base game with stunning visual quality.

# Featuring:
Over 10+ Cursed Techniques to choose from
Custom NPCs
Dynamic Quest System & Structures
8+ Unique Armor Sets
Trait System for Build Crafting
Binding Vows
Evolving Cursed Techniques

# FAQ:
Q: How do I begin my journey?
A: Begin by playing regular minecraft. Level up by using abilities, fighting curses, etc.

Q: My VFX is broken, why?
A: That is typically an issue associated with Photon, we cannot fix that on our side.

Q: Will you add ___?
A: We have a roadmap of ideas and we will be adding tons of content, feel free to join the discord and suggest!

Q: Why is the Quest Board disabled?
A: The Quest Board has been disabled due to the mission system being reworked in the future, please progress without it (fight curses, play normal minecraft, kill mobs).


# Extra Information:
Required Mods:
Player Animator, Geckolib, Photon, Kleiders Custom Renderer

Credits: ImNotHURAGAN (Coder & Artist), gumelthemodeler (Primary Artist), colinJM (Alpha State Artist), Noii (Rebrand credits), Lautaro4708z (Primary Animator)
